summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Daily Bonus feature for Ryvenox Empire. Backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI components functional with minor game state refresh delay.

fixed_bugs.issue: 500 Internal Server Error when trying to claim twice within cooldown
fixed_bugs.fix_applied: Fixed variable naming conflict between 'status' dict and FastAPI status module

ui_bugs.issue: Modal backdrop intercepts close button clicks

integration_issues.issue: Game state display doesn't refresh immediately after claiming bonus

passed_tests: Daily bonus status endpoint returns correct data
Daily bonus can be claimed when available (new user)
Daily bonus cannot be claimed twice within 24 hours (existing user)
Daily bonus button visible in game UI
Countdown timer displays when bonus unavailable
Button state changes after claiming bonus
Modal content displays correctly (streak, reward, claims)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI improvements: 1) Fix modal close button overlay issue in DailyBonus component, 2) Ensure game state refreshes immediately after daily bonus claim
